Kali-p..Back: The back feels cold. Eruptions on the back, pimples. Weight in lumbar region. The nape and back lame.
Kali-p..Back, pain: Pain in the back during rest, ameliorated by motion, respiration aggravates, during menses. Pains in occiput and loins morning on waking, ameliorated lying on back, passing off after rising. Intense pain along spine.
Kali-p..Chest: This remedy has been favorably mentioned in angina pectoris. Anxiety in the chest in the morning. Catarrh of the chest. Spasmodic constriction. Constriction of the heart.
Kali-p..Extremities: Cold hands and feet. Feet cold and damp. Cramps in thighs, calves and soles. Heaviness of limbs, of lower limbs and feet. Numbness of the limbs, upper and lower; hands and finger tips, feet and legs.
Kali-p..Extremities, coldness: Cold hands and feet. Feet cold and damp.
Kali-p..Generalities: The over-sensitive, nervous, delicate person, worn out from long suffering, much sorrow and vexation, and prolonged mental work; also such as are broken down from sexual excesses and vices.
Kali-p..Generalities, weakness, enervation: The weakness, emaciation, and anaemia and tubercular tendency are strong features of this wonderful antipsoric remedy. All forms of nervous weakness.
Kali-p..Genitalia female: In tired out nervous women who are subject to abortion. Aversion to coition. Desire increased, intense for four or five days after menses. Inflammation of uterus. Itching from leucorrhoea.
Kali-p..Head: The head is cold, and sensitive to cold air. Congestion; fullness of the head felt on coughing. Heat in head evening, flushes of heat in the forehead. The head inclines to fall forward.
Kali-p..Mind: Flies into a passion and can hardly articulate. Aversion to answering questions. Apprehensive anxiety, in the evening in bed, and during the night; anxiety after eating, about the future, about his health, about his salvation.
Kali-p..Mouth: The tongue is dark coated and bleeding. The gums bleed, and are covered with sores. The typhoid mouth, tongue and teeth in septic fevers when there are putrid odors.
Kali-p..Skin: Burning after scratching. The skin is cold, jaundiced, dry. Eruption moist, and the moisture is bad smelling. Itching, crawling, stinging in the skin. Very sensitive skin.
Kali-p..Generalities, pain: The pains are aching, pressing, stitching, tearing, tearing downwards, paralyzing. Chronic neuralgia, ameliorated by gentle motion, aggravated from cold.
Kali-p..Generalities, side: Symptoms are often one-sided. One sided paralysis from a gradually increasing weakness.
Kali-p..Generalities, weakness: Great lassitude. All forms of nervous weakness. The weakness, emaciation, and anaemia and tubercular tendency are strong features of this wonderful antipsoric remedy.
Kali-p..Clinical: Too many cures have been made by the followers of Schiiessler to permit this remedy to remain unexplained. Good provings are found in our literature. The high and highest potencies have served the best, and it should be used in the single dose.
Kali-p..Chest, pain: Pain in chest during cough, on inspiration, on motion, on breathing. Pain in lower part of chest on coughing, inside of chest, in heart. Aching in left side of chest through to scapula. Burning in chest. Stitching in chest on coughing, during respiration, in mammaze, sides of chest, in heart. Tearing pains in chest.
Kali-p..Ear: Discharge from the ear, bloody, offensive, putrid, purulent. Eruptions on the ears. Pimples in the canal. Fullness in ears. The ears are hot.
Kali-p..Head, pain: It has much pain in the head. Pain morning in bed, on rising, on waking, and passes off on moving about. Pain afternoon, evening and night. Worse in very cold air, but ameliorated in open fresh air.
Kali-p..Mind, sadness, mental depression: Sadness in morning on waking, in the evening, and also day and night. Insanity; melancholia; thinks she has sinned away her day of grace and refuses to eat.
Kali-p..Stool: The stool is excoriating; bloody mucus or pure blood, brown, clay colored, watery stool; putrid flatus followed by tenesmus after breakfast. Stool copious, dark, frequent; large, light colored. Lienteric stools. Stools offensive, putrid, purulent, watery, like rice water, yellow or yellowish green mucus.
Kali-p..Generalities, heat: Fever in afternoon and evening. Heat all night, with hunger. Dry heat. Flushes of heat. Internal heat.
Kali-p..Genitalia female, menses: Menses absent, black, copious, dark, delayed, frequent, irregular, late, offensive, painful, pale, protracted, scanty, short, suppressed, thick. Uterine haemorrhage.
Kali-p..Mind, sadness: Sadness in morning on waking, in the evening, and also day and night. Obstinate; morose; mood changeable. Discontented and sad.
Kali-p..Ear, discharges: Discharge from the ear, bloody, offensive, putrid, purulent.
Kali-p..Extremities, pain: Rheumatic and gouty pains in limbs and joints, ameliorated by motion and warmth. Pain in back and limbs, ameliorated by motion. Pain in shoulders and arms, in arms when raising them. Sciatica, ameliorated by gentle motion.
Kali-p..Genitalia male: Erections very troublesome in the morning and during the night without sexual desire; violent in the morning. Impotency. Frequent seminal emissions with erections. Inflammation of glans penis. Sexual passion obliterated.
